description: IssuesWorld reference performance corpus (plan 50). Frozen shape: one Space, evenly distributed issues, per-issue semantic events and labels, distinct per-project policy context, and an incremental sync tail. The harness (tests/issues_reference_perf.rs) builds it exclusively through the public daemon/control surface; direct Fabric/Replica fixtures do not satisfy this gate.
baselinesNote: p95 baselines are frozen from the first full-scale run on the pinned CI runner image and require reviewer approval in the same change that freezes them; a budget update alone cannot green a regression. Until frozen, the absolute budgets above are enforced and the regression comparison is recorded but not gated.
